chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No. D — 744 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 27.04.2022. FOR ORDERS AS TO NON-PROSECUTION. ------ Ever since this petition was filed petitioner and their counsel has not marked their presence and continuously since last three dates are being called absent. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
